title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at L&T Infotech

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at L&T Infotech
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? L&T Infotech in Aurangabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About L&T Infotech:
L&T Infotech is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Infotech!
